Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Sep-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Chris D'Anjou (408-291-5401) for Plaintiff/opposing party Maria I De Arenaza.
David Wasserman (415-567-9600) for Defendant/Moving party THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC.
Court reporter: Alesia Collins CSR #7751 (T- 415-591-3333; E- alesia@yahoo.com).

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Defendant's counsel stated Mosser Company does not own 308 Jessie Street, they are lessees occupied by bookkeepers and accountants. Plaintiff's counsel stated his client is present in the courtroom, is struggling because of the accident, and dealing with cultural/language issues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC's Motion To Vacate Entry Of Default is GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Alesia Collins CSR #7751 (T- 415-591-3333; E- alesia@yahoo.com). (D501)
